title: Pneumatic Height Adjustable Table
brand_hint: Likely OTG / Offices to Go (Height Adjustable Tables)

specs.manufacturer: OTG / Offices to Go (a division of Global Furniture Group)
specs.materials: Powder-coated steel base with pneumatic lift, laminate worktop
key_features: Compatible with OTG laminate desk tops
specs.notes: OTG offers both pneumatic and electric height-adjustable bases; OTGHABASE3 is the 3-stage variant. Specific BBI SKU and worktop dimensions not surfaced — verify with supplier.
